summary: Determines whether the second source-mapping position should be treated as at or after the first in generated-output order.
signature_intent: Accepts two position-like mapping records and returns a boolean ordering result.
behavior: Returns true when the second record is on a later generated line.
Returns true when both records are on the same generated line and the second column is the same or later.
Returns true when the generated-position comparator considers the first record not greater than the second.
Returns false only when all ordering checks indicate the second record comes before the first.
edge_cases: Equal line and column values return true.
A second record on an earlier line can still return true if the comparator allows it.
A second record on the same line with an earlier column can still return true if the comparator allows it.
